rationale: Diff contains only execution evidence files (manifest.json, result.json) under .ddx/executions/. No schema, storage, or read-path code changes are present, so none of AC1–AC7 can be verified from this diff.

findings.summary: AC1 unverifiable: no schema definition changes introducing on_read_defaults block in the diff.
AC2 unverifiable: no read-path logic applying defaults for older schema_version entities is present in the diff.
AC3 unverifiable: no warning-emitting logic for required-without-default fields visible in the diff.
AC4 unverifiable: cannot confirm storage is unchanged on read; no storage adapter or read-handler changes shown.
AC5 unverifiable: no opt-in eager revalidation pathway (US-060) referenced in the diff.
AC6 unverifiable: no test files added/modified; cannot confirm cargo test/clippy clean from diff alone.
AC7 unverifiable: no DDx integration sanity test included; result.json claims success but actual implementation is not part of this diff.
result.json references result_rev b825d0c (commit 'feat(schema): add lazy-read schema defaults') which appears to contain the actual implementation, but its contents are not in the reviewable diff.
